---
title: "quarto-exercises"
---

`quarto-exercises` is a Quarto extension for small interactive practice questions in HTML documents.

Use it to add multiple-choice questions, inline blanks and choices--including in code, with syntax highlighting--to Quarto pages.

## Install

```bash
quarto add VisruthSK/quarto-exercises
```

Enable the filter in a document or project:

```yaml
filters:
  - quarto-exercises
```

## Pages

- [Example](example.qmd): a complete document showing the extension in use.
- [Reference](reference.qmd): problem types, configuration, options, and authoring patterns.
- [Full Page Check](full-page-check.qmd): one page-level Check and Reset control with scores.
- [GitHub README](https://github.com/VisruthSK/quarto-exercises#readme): package documentation and more details.
